message:
🌱 Add opentofu: Allow arbitrary expressions in the `prevent_destroy` mission (#827)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentofu-2522-allow-arbitrary-expressions-in-the-prevent-destroy-argument-of-a-r",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentofu: Allow arbitrary expressions in the `prevent_destroy` argument of a `resource` lifecycle block",
+    "description": "Allow arbitrary expressions in the `prevent_destroy` argument of a `resource` lifecycle block. Requested by 58+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check OpenTofu installation",
+        "description": "Verify your OpenTofu version:\n```bash\ntofu version\n```\nThis feature requires OpenTofu installed locally. Install via `brew install opentofu` or download from https://opentofu.org/docs/intro/install/."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Understand the feature context",
+        "description": "This is a sub-issue of https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/1329, discussing details specific to the `prevent_destroy` lifecycle argument."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Allow arbitrary expressions in the `prevent_destroy`\u2026",
+        "description": "This is a prototype for #2522.\n\nPreviously we always evaluated prevent_destroy for a managed resource at config load time, requiring it to be static.\n\nHowever, we don't actually need the value until runtime so we can instead defer evaluation of the expression and populate it with a dynamic\n```hcl\n\u2577\n\u2502 Error: Variables not allowed\n\u2502 \n\u2502   on prevent-destroy-dynamic.tf line 7, in resource \"aws_db_instance\" \"example\":\n\u2502    7:     prevent_destroy = var.prevent_database_destroy\n\u2502 \n\u2502 Variables may not be used here.\n\u2575\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the feature is working as expected:\n```bash\ntofu version\ntofu validate\ntofu plan\n```\nConfirm that the feature described in \"Allow arbitrary expressions in the `prevent_destroy` argument of a `resource` lifecycle block\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This is a prototype for #2522.\n\nPreviously we always evaluated prevent_destroy for a managed resource at config load time, requiring it to be static.\n\nHowever, we don't actually need the value until runtime so we can instead defer evaluation of the expression and populate it with a dynamic expression result, allowing modules to populate it based on input variables and other external data.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opentofu",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",

+    ],

+    ],

+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/2522",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/pull/2305"
+    },
+    "reactions": 58,
+    "comments": 3,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "tofu"
+    ],
+    "description": "OpenTofu CLI installed (brew install opentofu or download from opentofu.org). Terraform provider credentials as needed for the specific configuration."
+  },
